rounds: Chemist aisle, nail polish, no flinching — that was his. Necklace, black bag, Noskin loafers to Lavendra — also his, and that one stings for the joy police because those are his people. Pink toes held all week and the thong at Balmoral was an active choice, not an accident. But the poncho? They got that one — brave choice, zero exposure, security blanket intact. And the wetsuit moment with the swim group? They showed up loud and he almost let them win.
pattern: They're quiet with strangers, loud with his people — and now they've gone underground into the daily routines where he can't even see them anymore.
focus: Look at one daily routine this week and ask — is this what I'd choose, or just what I do?
